channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bipartisan condolences pour in after death of Senator Lindsey Graham
item.description: The sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham drew condolences from President Donald Trump, world leaders, and lawmakers across party lines.

item.title: Waltz says Iran is not complying with memorandum of understanding after latest U.S. strikes
item.description: U.N. Ambassador Mike Waltz appeared on "This Week" following U.S. retaliatory strikes against Iran for attacking a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Democratic Senator Dick Durbin calls Senator Lindsey Graham a 'fair-minded person'
item.description: Democratic Senator Dick Durbin of Illinois discusses his friendship and political disagreements with Senator Lindsey Graham, who died suddenly.

item.title: Archaeologists discover 3,000-year-old tomb near Luxor, Egypt
item.description: Inscriptions indicate the burial site belonged to a man named Paser.
